field_guide.status: Operational status of the level for the day.
field_guide.event_count: Number of events recorded in the corresponding daily registry.
field_guide.top_events: List of the most relevant event IDs for the level.
field_guide.dominant_pressures: List of the main pressures affecting the level on that day.
field_guide.derived_from: List of upper-level event IDs or checkpoint dependencies.

rules: scope must match the territorial level
event_count must equal the number of events in the corresponding registry
top_events should contain only valid event IDs from that scope
dominant_pressures should summarize the day without replacing the registry
generated_at must be a UTC timestamp
notes: Operational template for creating daily checkpoints in REP Reality Stack.
